ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the article in text format */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who created the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, review, published) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is archived */,
  "featured_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the featured image of the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the article in minutes */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original source if the article is a re-post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the author */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the author's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category it belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article on which the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is approved */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was viewed */,
  "is_unique" INTEGER /* Indicates if the view is unique */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the view (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_edits" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was edited */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor that made the changes */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the edit was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_edits_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_edits_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been deleted */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
